title: cynanchum filisepalum
intro: Cynanchum filisepalum, also known as the forked or two-horned milkweed vine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum filisepalum include its potential in reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into tea or used as a decoction, or it can be taken as a capsule or tablet after being processed into a standardized extract.
